args.Description: "Muda o preenchimento py-1.8 do botão Entendido no customDialog para py-2 (classe padrão do Tailwind)"
args.Instruction: "Mudar className do botão de Entendido de py-1.8 para py-2."
args.ReplacementContent:
"                       <button
                         type="button"
                         onClick={() => setCustomDialog(prev => ({ ...prev, isOpen: false }))}
                         className="px-6 py-2 bg-[#8959f5] hover:bg-[#7846e3] text-white rounded-full text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider transition-all cursor-pointer shadow-md shadow-[#8959f5]/15"
                       >"
args.TargetContent:
"                       <button
                         type="button"
                         onClick={() => setCustomDialog(prev => ({ ...prev, isOpen: false }))}
                         className="px-6 py-1.8 bg-[#8959f5] hover:bg-[#7846e3] text-white rounded-full text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-wider transition-all cursor-pointer shadow-md shadow-[#8959f5]/15"
                       >"
args.toolAction: "Mudar padding do botão Entendido do customDialog para py-2"
